title: NetMonitor Settings
description: Managed settings for the NetMonitor menu bar app.

MonitorHost.title: Monitor Host
MonitorHost.description: Host used for the TCP latency / reachability check. Use an internal server to monitor on-prem reachability, or a public host (1.1.1.1 / 8.8.8.8) for general internet.

MonitorPort.title: Monitor Port
MonitorPort.description: TCP port to connect to on the host. 443 is a safe default.

WarnLatencyMs.title: Warn Threshold (ms)
WarnLatencyMs.description: Latency at or above this turns the indicator yellow.

CriticalLatencyMs.title: Critical Threshold (ms)
CriticalLatencyMs.description: Latency at or above this turns the indicator red.
